description: You are a field robotics engineer at an agricultural robotics company. You need to validate an autonomous tractor's camera-based obstacle detection system under early-morning adverse weather conditions. Configure the environment to replicate dawn/overcast lighting with light fog by adding a Fog node (color: 0.93 0.96 1.0, fogType: EXPONENTIAL, visibilityRange: 50.0 meters), adjusting the DirectionalLight (intensity: 0.4, color: 1 0.9 0.7), and modifying the Background (skyColor: 0.4 0.5 0.6, luminosity: 0.8). Additionally, update the 'FIELD_ROBOT' perception_camera far clipping plane to 80.0 meters. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/adverse_weather.wbt.
